calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing And Application For Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Angela Bradstreet. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Brian R. Blackman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Civic Asset Management GP, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Paul Im, Managing Member for Civic Asset Management GP, LLC, was placed under oath and testfied.
No appearance by the defaulted defendants Young Inspirations, Inc., d/b/a Young Inspirations, a Pennsylvania non-profit corporation, Frank Jacobs, an individual or Kimberly Jacobs, an individual.
Defaults were entered against the defendants on August 24, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 24, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Civic Asset Management GP, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendants, Young Inspirations, Inc., d/b/a Young Inspirations, a Pennsylvania non-profit corporation, Frank Jacobs, an individual and Kimberly Jacobs, an individual, as follows:

Damages - $200,106.92.
Pre-Judgment Interest - $48,241.60.
Attorney Fees - $13,380.50.
Costs - $975.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $262,704.02.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
